OP08-001.name: Tony Tony.Chopper
OP08-001.effect: [Activate: Main] [Once Per Turn] Give up to 3 of your {Animal} or {Drum Kingdom} type Characters up to 1 rested DON!! card each.

OP08-002.name: Marco
OP08-002.effect: [DON!! x1] [Activate: Main] [Once Per Turn] Draw 1 card and place 1 card from your hand at the top or bottom of your deck. Then, give up to 1 of your opponent's Characters −2000 power during this turn.

OP08-003.name: Twenty Doctors
OP08-003.effect: [Blocker] (After your opponent declares an attack, you may rest this card to make it the new target of the attack.)

OP08-004.name: Kuromarimo

OP08-005.name: Chess
OP08-005.effect: [On Play] Give up to 1 of your opponent's Characters −2000 power during this turn. Then, if you don't have [Kuromarimo], play up to 1 [Kuromarimo] from your hand.

OP08-006.name: Chessmarimo

Then, place the rest at the top or bottom of your deck.
